# Test Collection

This is a test collection used for integration testing of the Ansible Galaxy Publisher proxy.

## Purpose

This collection is used to test the end-to-end workflow of:
1. Building a collection tarball
2. Authenticating with OIDC tokens
3. Publishing through the proxy
4. Verifying the upload succeeded

## Contents

This is a minimal collection with no actual content - just enough structure to create a valid tarball.
